roles.brand: Identity color. Used for logos, wordmarks, brand moments only.
roles.primary: Primary interactive color. Buttons, links, active states, focus rings.
roles.primary-subtle: Low-emphasis primary. Backgrounds behind primary text, chips.
roles.accent: Secondary interactive color. Badges, tags, highlights, secondary CTAs.
roles.neutral-900: Strongest text. Headings, primary body copy on light.
roles.neutral-700: Secondary text. Subheadings, captions, supporting copy.
roles.neutral-100: Subtle backgrounds. Hover states on neutral elements.
roles.neutral-50: Page background alternate. Striped table rows.
roles.surface: Primary surface. Main background, card backgrounds.
roles.surface-raised: Elevated surface. Cards, modals, dropdowns (one level above surface).
roles.text-on-primary: Text/icon color when placed on primary background.
roles.text-on-accent: Text/icon color when placed on accent background.
